company: GE Medical Systems Ultrasound & Primary Care Diagnostics LLC
intended_use: The Vivid iq is high-performance compact diagnostic ultrasound system designed for Cardiovascular and Shared Services. It is intended for use by qualified and trained Healthcare professionals for Ultr
intended_use_full: The Vivid iq is high-performance compact diagnostic ultrasound system designed for Cardiovascular and Shared Services. It is intended for use by qualified and trained Healthcare professionals for Ultrasound imaging, measurement, display and analysis of the human body and fluid.
target_condition: Left ventricular function assessment in cardiac imaging
ground_truth: Manual delineation by two certified cardiologists with consensus review by a panel of experienced experts for disagreements
other_metrics: Dice score 92% or higher across different countries; 91% or higher across different scanning views; 92% or higher across different left ventricle volumes
